description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a before_script to download and install Docker 17.05.0‑ce from get.docker.com, extract it to /usr/local, add it to PATH, and set DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Include the docker:dind service for Docker‑in‑Docker support. Define a test stage with two jobs, py27 and py34, using the python:2.7 and python:3.4 images respectively, each running pip install . then python tests.py. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
